title: Chun Ye
text: Home * People * Chun Ye Chun Ye , a Chinese computer scientist who holds a Master's degree with the thesis title Experiments in Selective Search Extensions in 1992 from the University of Alberta under supervision of Tony Marsland . Chun Ye further co-authored with Marsland on the Chinese Chess program and 3rd Computer Olympiad shared gold medal winner Abyss , which was also subject of his thesis. The framework of Abyss was based on the Western experimental Chess program Parabelle by Fred Popowich and Tony Marsland [1] . Selected Publications [ edit ] [2] Chun Ye ( 1992 ). Experiments in Selective Search Extensions . M.Sc. thesis, Department of Computing Science, University of Alberta Chun Ye , Tony Marsland ( 1992 ). Experiments in Forward Pruning with Limited Extensions. ICCA Journal, Vol. 15, No. 2 , pdf Chun Ye , Tony Marsland ( 1992 ). Selective Extensions in Game-Tree Search.
